title: UnstableCraft
description: A chaotic modpack with every mod imaginable.
body:
# ![text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6725008db401f1de4b8be3ff8324a9a606f9f112.png)

## About

A chaotic modpack with every mod imaginable, inspired by CrazyCraft or InsaneCraft. This is a personal modpack for some friends of mine on a server, but I might as well make some ad revenue money off of it. We wanted the server to be a version of the Unstable SMP, but that didn't work out, but in remembrance of the original idea, it is called UnstableCraft. The Unstable SMP will cease to exist in favor of UnstableCraft. Contrary to the name, I hope to make the modpack as stable as I can.

## Performance & Stability

I want to make this modpack as stable and performant as possible, but with the large amount of mods I plan to add, I cannot guarantee that it will work well on lower-end pcs. 

## Content

This modpack has over 500 mods, with little to no regard for balance, uniquely from other kitchen sink modpacks like it.

## Multiplayer

This modpack was made for a private server, but if the pack gets popular I might make a public server for it. But for now, using [Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) to host your own worlds or making your own server is reccomended. If a public server ever happens, it will be after the modpack gets most of it's content mods.
